name: close
full_help:
Topic              Description
close_bd_design    This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features ipintegrator'.
close_design       Close the current design
close_hw           This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features labtools'.

close_project      Close current opened project
close_saif         This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features simulator'.
close_sim          This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features simulator'.
close_vcd          This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features simulator'.
close_wave_config  This command is auto loaded by Tcl. To explicitly load the command type 'load_features simulator'.

% help create_project
